name: Recipe Creator
description: Recipe creation editor with sectioned forms, drag-and-drop ingredient and step ordering, and a personal recipe management table.

page_briefs.create: Recipe creation form with sections for title, description, cuisine tags, and cover photo upload. Drag-sortable ingredient list with quantity, unit, and name fields. Step editor with photo upload per step. Preview panel on the side. Publish and save-as-draft actions.
page_briefs.my-recipes: Data table of the user's own recipes with columns for title, status (draft/published), created date, views, and saves. Row actions for edit, duplicate, and delete. Filter by status.

shells.sidebar-main: Collapsible sidebar navigation with main content area
